name: NULL
subtitle: The Absence
description: What existed before the universe. What still exists around it. Pure absence. Ferdinand's roots drink here. The Seven Sin Codices were written on its inside by hands that had to exist before writing existed. Smurjan walks here casually; anyone else dies in seconds.
gate: The Root Crack (a fissure in Scalelist's ground)

life.phenomenon: You hear your own heartbeat EXTERNALLY. There is nothing else to hear. The sound is Ferdinand drinking from the absence to feed the universe above.
life.inhabitants: Smurjan (casually). Occasional lost souls (briefly). The Root-Spirits (bark creatures tethered to Ferdinand's roots). That's it.

fauna.name: Root-Spirit
fauna.note: Attached to a root. Each has a number tattoo = how many heartbeats they have counted. Oldest known: 4.8 billion.

fauna.name: Void Worm
fauna.note: Digests absence. They are how absence stays fresh. Without them, Null would clot.

flora.name: Nothing
flora.note: Or rather: everything-that-has-not-been-planted-yet. Potential, not actual.

life.architecture: None. Only Ferdinand's descending roots — silver-barked, kilometers long, impossibly thin.
life.culture: There is no culture because there is no one. But if you manage to stay — and only Smurjan has — you become the custom.
life.signature_item: A Single Cork Piece — the most valuable thing in Null. The only thing that still exists here. Traded for lifetimes.

sensory.smell: Nothing. You realize you have never smelled 'nothing' before.
sensory.feel: You still have a body. You are just certain the body is a kindness, not a fact.

cities.name: The Root Crack
cities.note: A fissure in the ground on Scalelist's northwest. Do not enter first.
cities.lore: A vertical crack in the soil. Standing over it, you feel the universe's absence breathing upward. Anyone who enters first is lost. Anyone who enters second arrives.

cities.name: The Roots of Ferdinand
cities.role: Where the cork oak drinks from the void
cities.note: Ferdinand's roots extend into Null. You can see them if you do not look directly.
cities.lore: Ferdinand drinks absence. That is how he holds the universe without being burdened. The roots are silver-bark. Do not touch them unless you are Smurjan.

cities.name: Smurjan's Seat
cities.role: Where Smurjan rests when visiting Null
cities.note: A single rock. The only solid thing in the upper Null.
cities.lore: Smurjan comes here to think. Thinking in Null is different. Time does not pass. Conclusions arrive without effort.

cities.name: The Unwriting
cities.note: A blank patch. The only way to tell it is a patch is that everything around it still exists.
cities.lore: K-XII broke the Ferdinand Oath. K-V convened. The Twelfth was unwritten. This is the empty space where their existence used to be. You cannot enter it — there is nothing to enter.

sacred_sites.name: The Seven Codices Inscription
sacred_sites.note: Where the Seven Sin Codices were written on the inside of Null.
sacred_sites.lore: The inscription exists but cannot be read. The hand that wrote it predates writing. Only Trollmage has read it, and only backwards.

sacred_sites.name: The First Heartbeat
sacred_sites.note: The exact point where the first pulse entered Null and built Ferdinand.
sacred_sites.lore: Nothing marks it. The universe does. Stand here and you feel every heartbeat that has ever happened, all at once. Most visitors leave within 30 seconds.
